reports.title: Executive Report — Jul 18, 2026
reports.summary: Executive report — 8,000 total requests, 2,571 open (67.9% resolved). Average resolution 76.0h; 573 high/critical open. Highest-volume borough: Brooklyn. Leading complaint types: Noise - Residential (1,642), Illegal Parking (1,323), HEAT/HOT WATER (973).

reports.title: Executive Report — Jul 18, 2026
reports.summary: Automated executive summary: operations nominal across the five boroughs; resolution SLAs tracked; high-priority queue monitored by the AI copilot.
